summary: Provision a new AppConfig application container. Greenfield today (no AppConfig application exists yet in this estate) — the create stands up the empty application; environments, configuration profiles and deployments are engineer follow-ups.

operations.title: Provision a new AppConfig application
operations.summary: Request a brand-new AppConfig application container; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up an AppConfig application as a complete specification: name and description. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: application_name
params.label: Application name
params.help: Names the application in the AppConfig console and the generated draft.

params.name: description
params.label: Description
params.help: What this application groups configuration for.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this application is for
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this application.

decisions: Configuration profiles, deployment strategies, environments, and hosted configuration versions are provisioned as engineer follow-ups after the application exists.
